description_long: This is a large, modern storage cabinet featuring a combination of open shelving and closed compartments. The left section consists of multiple open wooden shelves, ideal for displaying or storing items, while the right section is composed of four tall, white doors with integrated handles, likely concealing additional storage space. The top surfaces of both sections are flat and finished in a wood texture, providing extra space for placing objects. The cabinet's design contrasts natural wood grain with sleek white panels, giving it a contemporary and versatile appearance suitable for urban interiors such as offices, garages, or communal spaces. The handles are vertically oriented and evenly spaced, suggesting easy access to the interior compartments. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetics.
description: A large, modern cabinet with open wooden shelves on one side and four tall white doors with handles on the other, combining wood and white finishes for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured panel and the depth of the cabinet, with shelving structure visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four white doors with handles and the open wooden shelving section on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the white panel side and the depth of the cabinet, with the shelving structure visible at the top.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the wood-textured back panel and the white back of the main cabinet, with no visible handles or shelves.
